allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5000/src/pages/prd.tsx 2>&1 | grep -i "error" || echo "No errors in prd.tsx compilation")
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:5000/ | grep -o "PRD Debug" || echo "Not found in response")
Bash(lsof -i :5000 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "Port 5000 is free")
Bash(fuser -k 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; lsof -i :5000 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo "Port 5000 is free")

Bash(git add client/src/App.tsx client/src/index.css client/src/components/prd/ client/src/hooks/use-prd-store.ts client/src/lib/prd-constants.ts client/src/lib/prd-defaults.ts client/src/lib/prd-storage.ts client/src/pages/prd.tsx client/src/types/prd.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Integrate PRD wireframe into full-stack app with Denim City theme

Decompose the standalone PRD.html into TypeScript React components using
Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui, wired into the Vite + Express scaffold via wouter.

- Replace all placeholder CSS variables with Denim City HSL palette
- Add 16 new files: types, constants, defaults, storage, state hook,
  10 components \(editable-text, annotations, blocks, views, toolbar, sidebar\),
  and the PRD page
- Reorganize site structure: activity-based navigation \(Store, Education,
  Lab & Atelier, Tours, Collaborate, About, Contact\), with Individuals
  and Companies & Schools as audience landing pages nested under Home
- Store split into Brands, Collabs, Fabrics, Repair & Customization, Made to Order
- Education consolidates Academy, Incubator, Jean School, Archive, Library
- Lab & Atelier restructured: Sustainable Laundry R&D, Prototyping,
  Capsule Collections, Made-to-Order, Custom Made Products
- Press updated with press releases and downloadable imagery
- Homepage follows Model 3 \(Vitra/Design Museum pattern\): universal for
  all visitors, no B2C/B2B routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add client/src/types/prd.ts client/src/lib/image-utils.ts client/src/lib/prd-constants.ts client/src/lib/prd-storage.ts client/src/lib/prd-defaults.ts client/src/hooks/use-prd-store.ts client/src/components/prd/block-image-gallery.tsx client/src/components/prd/doc-link-badge.tsx client/src/components/prd/storage-indicator.tsx client/src/components/prd/block-card.tsx client/src/components/prd/prd-sidebar.tsx docs/prd-tool-guide.md docs/denim-city-platform-overview.md)
